query:
-- Which feeds still errored last night (run 2130001)?
SELECT name, feedUrl, consecutiveErrors, LEFT(lastError, 80) as lastError, lastSuccessAt
FROM rssSources
WHERE consecutiveErrors > 0
ORDER BY consecutiveErrors DESC;
